headline: Optum Rx Transparency Shift And What It May Mean For UNH Valuation
summary: Optum Rx, the pharmacy benefits unit of UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH), has introduced a new transparent, fee-based pharmacy care model. The model separates Optum Rx’s compensation from drug list prices and prescription volumes, focusing instead on a clear service fee structure. This change marks a shift in how pharmacy benefits are priced and delivered, with implications for patients, employers, and health plans. headline: Dow Gives Back Early Gains. Healthcare Stocks Are a Drag.
summary: The Dow gave back its opening gains, with healthcare stocks a big drag.  The blue-chip index was trading flat, while the S&P 500 was up 0.9%, and the Nasdaq rose 1.4%.  UnitedHealth Group and Amgen, among the Dow's top five stocks, were down by nearly 3% and 0.4%, respectively.
